title: iPhone Subway Hugging Couple

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a completely RAW quality, unprocessed, unedited image with full iPhone camera quality. A subway station in USA, a momentary blur. The subway is in motion. In front of the subway, there is an elderly woman and man holding daisies. They are hugging.
